title: veronica austriaca subsp. teucrium
intro: Veronica austriaca subsp. teucrium, also known as the alpine speedwell, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Veronica austriaca subsp. teucrium include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate sore throats. Herbal preparations of Veronica austriaca subsp. teucrium include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
